intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Get More Views on YouTube. Views come from search, browse, and suggested surfaces. Strong titles, thumbnails, and audience retention matter more than posting volume alone. Avoid ranking or revenue guarantees.
mainSummary: Views come from search, browse, and suggested surfaces. Strong titles, thumbnails, and audience retention matter more than posting volume alone. Avoid ranking or revenue guarantees.
keyTakeaways: Click-through and retention work as a pair
One breakthrough video rarely fixes weak packaging
Do not claim guaranteed ranking outcomes
